ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), NOT( CONTAINS($Label.CCCMRetrieveRecordTypeIds,RecordType.DeveloperName) ),NOT(CONTAINS($Label.ALDSATRecordTypeIds,RecordType.DeveloperName)), ISPICKVAL(Status,"Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Complaint_justified__c,"Yes"), OR( RecordType.Name = "Case External India", RecordType.Name = "Case External Turkey", RecordType.Name = "Case External Latvia", RecordType.Name = "Case External Lithuania", RecordType.Name = "Case External Estonia", RecordType.Name = "Case External Brazil", RecordType.Name = "Case External Algeria", RecordType.Name = "Case External Bulgaria", RecordType.Name = "Case External Norway", RecordType.Name = "Case External Morocco", RecordType.Name = "Case External Greece", RecordType.Name = "Case External Romania", RecordType.Name = "Case External Russia", RecordType.Name = "Case External Sweden"), AND(ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Type__c,"Complaint"), OR(ISPICKVAL(Complaint_type__c,""),ISPICKVAL(Complaint_reason__c,""),ISBLANK(Financial_impact__c), ISBLANK(Complaint_Description__c),ISPICKVAL(Solution__c,""),ISBLANK(Detail_ActionPlan__c), AND( RecordType.Name <> "Case External Romania", ISBLANK(Text(Commercial_Gesture_Amount__c)) ), ISPICKVAL(Commercial_Gesture__c,""))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must fill in all fields in the “Complaints” section
